nasb.text: Surely you will be ashamed of the oaks which you have desired, And you will be embarrassed at the gardens which you have chosen.

esv.text: For they shall be ashamed of the oaks that you desired; and you shall blush for the gardens that you have chosen.

cnv.text: 你們必因你們所喜愛的橡樹抱愧， 必因你們所選擇的園子蒙羞。

ccb.text: 你们必因在橡树下， 在你们选择的园子里祭拜偶像而蒙羞。

csbs.text: 你们必因你们所喜爱的橡树而蒙羞， 因你们所选择的园林而抱愧。
